A_value: sea ice treated as a 2-d continuum with vp rheology.; effective thermal conductivity assumes uniform subgrid thickness distribution.; albedo parameterized by surface state, snow / ice thickness.; snow-ice formation when snow depresses surface below sea level.
B_value: hydrostatic, boussinesq primitive equations, nonlinear eos.; parameterized mesoscale eddies via gm90, level-1.5 tke for vertical mixing.; bottom boundary-layer scheme for dense overflows.
AB_value: one-way coupling no feedback from wasp5 to shyfem; consistent spatial, temporal discretization between models; wasp5 compartments are derived from shyfem mesh

B_value: hydrostatic, primitive-equation ogcm with free surface, includes isopycnal mixing, gent-mcwilliams eddy advection, tke vertical mixing, double diffusion, a bottom boundary-layer scheme. coupled to lim for sea-ice interactions.; sea-ice state, fluxes from lim; sea-ice thermodynamic, dynamic state plus ice-ocean fluxes
AB_value: a one-way coupled modeling system that integrates shyfem a 3d finite element hydrodynamic model with wasp5 a water quality, ecological model to simulate the physical, biogeochemical dynamics of the venice lagoon. the shyfem model provides flow, salinity, temperature fields that drive the transport, transformation of nutrients, phytoplankton in wasp5.
